author: Tim Rice <tim.j.rice@hackrange.com>
name: anomaly_5xx_validation
summary: Validates wapiti / nikto / nuclei 'anomaly: 5xx' findings by replaying the captured request, scanning for information disclosure in the 5xx body, and using a same-length benign control payload to disambiguate content-driven 5xx from upstream buffer / size-driven 5xx (the common false-positive mode).

args.--url: Evidence URL of the finding (used as fallback when raw_data has no captured request)
args.--param: Parameter wapiti was injecting into (auto-detected from raw_data.parameter)
args.--module: Originating wapiti module (file / sql / xss / ...). Used to apply module-aware sanity checks; auto-detected from raw_data.module
args.--retries: Number of replays before declaring non-reproduction (default 2)
args.--control-char: Single character used to build the same-length benign control payload (default A)
